fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code for where the posted inventory pick occurred.

fields.name: Assigned User ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the ID of the user who is responsible for the document.
The field contains the user ID of the employee who was assigned to perform the posted inventory pick.
Some Role Centers contain an Activities part that shows how many documents are assigned to the current user. The information in this field is used to create the document statistics on the Role Center.

fields.name: Assignment Date
fields.tooltip:
Contains the date that the user was assigned the pick.
The program copies this information from the inventory pick header. You cannot change this field because the pick has been posted.

fields.name: Assignment Time
fields.tooltip:
Contains the time of day that the user was assigned the pick.
The program copies this information from the inventory pick header. You cannot change this field because the pick has been posted.

fields.name: Registering Date
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Indicates whether there is a comment for the posted inventory pick.

fields.name: Invt Pick No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the inventory pick number from which the pick was posted.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of times that the inventory pick has been printed.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date from the inventory pick.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Document
fields.tooltip: Contains the type of source document for the posted inventory pick. The program copies the value for this field from the inventory pick header. The options are Sales Order,Sales Return Order,Purchase Order,Purchase Return Order,Inbound Transfer,Outbound Transfer,Prod. Consumption, and Prod. Output.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip:
Contains the type of transaction that the source document is concerned with (for example, posted receipt, posted return receipt, posted shipment, posted return shipment).
The program copies this information from the inventory pick header. You cannot change this field because the pick has been posted.

fields.name: Source Subtype
fields.tooltip:
Contains the source subtype of the document to which the posted inventory pick relates.
The program copies this information from the inventory pick. You cannot change this field because the pick has been posted.

fields.name: Destination Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of destination that is associated with the posted inventory pick.
The following options exist:

Blank

Customer

Vendor

Location

Item

Family

Sales Order

fields.name: Destination No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number or the code of the customer, vendor, location, item, family, or sales order linked to the posted inventory pick.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: External Document No.2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.
